column1:
GEMS TARIFFS FOR CONTRACTED SERVICES FOR  ENHANCED REIMBURSEMENT FOR IN-ROOM PROCEDURES  
WITH EFFECT FROM 2026-01-01

column2:
In calculating the GEMS Tariff , the following rounding method is used: Values  R10 and below rounded to the nearest cent, R10+ rounded to the nearest 10cent. Modifier values are rounded to the nearest cent. When new item prices are calculated, e.g. when applying a modifier, the same rounding scheme should be followed.
ALL GEMS TARIFFS ARE VAT INCLUSIVE.
RULES GOVERNING THE STRUCTURE OF  THE GEMS MEDICAL PRACTITIONERS TARIFF FILES  APPLY
ENHANCED REIMBURSEMENT FOR IN-ROOM PROCEDURES INCLUDES ALL APPLICABLE MODIFIERS EXCEPT 0010 AND 0020, WHICH CAN BE BILLED ADDITIONALLY WHEN APPROPRIATE.
Repair of nail bed (only for ingrown toe nail)
Excision and repair by direct suture; excision nail fold or other minor procedures of similar magnitude ( only for ingrown toe nail)
Radical excision of nailbed ( only for ingrown toe nail)
Extensive resection for malignant soft tissue tumour including muscle
Excision of larger cancers as an ellipse and direct repair usually requiring undermining
Excision of small cancers as an ellipse and direct repair
Sigmoidoscopy: First and subsequent, with or without biopsy
Sigmoidoscopy with removal of polyps, first and subsequent
Proctoscopy with removal of polyps: First time
Proctoscopy with removal of polyps: Subsequent times
Cystoscopy: Hospital equipment (a specific practice request)
Vasectomy: Unilateral or bilateral (no extra fee to be charged if done in combination with prostatectomy)
Removal of small superficial benign lesions
Electro-, cryo-, chemo-, laser therapy of vulva and/or vagina (colposcopy directed)
Removal of benign vulva tumour or cyst
Vulva and introitus: Drainage of abscess
Destruction of condylomata by chemo-, cryo-, or electrotherapy, or harmonic scalpel: First lesion
Destruction of condylomata by chemo-, cryo-, or electrotherapy, or harmonic scalpel: Repeat – Limited
Destruction of condylomata by chemo-, cryo-, or electrotherapy, or harmonic scalpel: Widespread
Cryo- or electro-cauterisation, or Lletz of cervix (excluding cost of disposable loop electrode): In consulting room
Cryo- or electro-cauterisation, or Lletz of cervix (excluding cost of disposable loop electrode): Under anaesthetic
Cautery, laser or Harmonic scalpel treatment of the cervix
Cervix encerclage: Removal items 2409 and 2411: Without anaesthetic
Insertion of intra uterine contraceptive device (IUCD) (excluding after-care)
